## Decision
REFINE

## Justification
The decision to refine is based on the analysis revealing several methodological shortcomings that need attention before any conclusive results can be drawn. While the study shows promise through innovative strategies, the zero variance across seeds, inadequate sample size, and lack of statistical significance testing undermine the reliability of the findings.
